translations.### 歡迎貢獻及提出 Issue 將盡快修正\n\n: ### Contributions and Issues Are Welcome and Will Be Addressed Promptly
translations.#### 技術原理及開發故事：「 [手工打造 HTML 解析器的那些事](../: #### Technical Principles and Development Story: "[The Story of Handcrafting an HTML Parser](../2724f02f6e7/)"
translations.*另外 `NSAttributedString.DocumentType.htm: *Additionally, `NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html` will crash (EXC_BAD_ACCESS) with strings longer than 54,600+ characters.
translations.- Developed purely in Swift, it parses H:
- Developed purely in Swift, it parses HTML tags using Regex and performs tokenization, analyzes and corrects tag accuracy (fixing tags without ends & misaligned tags), then converts them into an abstract syntax tree. Finally, it uses the Visitor Pattern to map HTML tags to abstract styles, producing the final NSAttributedString result; it does not rely on any parser libraries. - Supports HTML Render (to NSAttributedString) / Stripper (Remove HTML Tags) / Selector Features - Automatically Analyze and Correct Tag Accuracy (Fix Missing End Tags & Misplaced Tags) `
` -> `
` `BoldBold+ItalicItalic` -> `BoldBold+ItalicItalic` `` -> `` (treat as String) - Support Custom Style Specification e.g. `` -> `weight: .semibold & underline: 1` - Support Custom Extension of HTML Tag Parsing e.g. Parse `` into the desired style - Includes architecture design for easy HTML tag extension Currently, besides supporting basic styles, it also supports rendering ul/ol/li lists and hr separators. Future extensions for other HTML tags can be quickly supported. - Support for Extended Style Parsing from `style` HTML Attribute HTML can specify text styles through the style attribute. Similarly, this package supports specifying styles from the `style` attribute. e.g. `` -> `Bold + font size 20 px` - Supports iOS/macOS - Support HTML Color Name to UIColor/NSColor - Test Coverage: 80%+ - Supports parsing of HTML tags such as `` images, `
    ` lists, `` tables, and more. - Higher Performance than `NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html`
translations.- Test Environment: 2022/M2/24GB Memory/:
- Test Environment: 2022/M2/24GB Memory/macOS 13.2/XCode 14.1

- X-axis: Number of HTML characters

- Y-axis: Rendering Time (seconds)
translations.- The hyperlink style in UITextView depe:
- The hyperlink style in UITextView depends on linkTextAttributes, so even if NSAttributedString.key is set, the effect may not appear.

- UILabel does not support specifying URL styles, so NSAttributedString.key may be set but have no visible effect.

- For rendering complex HTML, you still need to use WKWebView (including JS/tables rendering).
translations.UILabel 不支援指定 URL 樣式，所以會出現 NSAttributedS: UILabel does not support specifying URL styles, so NSAttributedString.key may be set but have no visible effect.
translations.UITextView 中的超連結樣式是看 linkTextAttributes，: The hyperlink style in UITextView depends on linkTextAttributes, so even if NSAttributedString.key is set, the effect may not appear.

translations.```swift\nimport ZMarkupParser\n\nlet pa:
```swift
import ZMarkupParser

let parser = ZHTMLParserBuilder.initWithDefault().set(rootStyle: MarkupStyle(font: MarkupStyleFont(size: 13))).build()
```
```swift
let attributedString = parser.render(htmlString) // NSAttributedString

// work with UITextView
textView.setHtmlString(htmlString)
// work with UILabel
label.setHtmlString(htmlString)
```
translations.```swift\nlet parser = ZHTMLParserBuilde: ```swift let parser = ZHTMLParserBuilder.initWithDefault().add(ExtendTagName("zhgchgli"), withCustomStyle: MarkupStyle(backgroundColor: MarkupStyleColor(name: .aquamarine))).build() // will use markupstyle you specify to render extend html tag let parser = ZHTMLParserBuilder.initWithDefault().add(B_HTMLTagName(), withCustomStyle: MarkupStyle(font: MarkupStyleFont(size: 18, weight: .style(.semibold)))).build() // will use markupstyle you specify to render instead of default bold markup style ```
translations.```swift\nlet selector = parser.selector: ```swift let selector = parser.selector(htmlString) // HTMLSelector e.g. input: TestLink selector.first("a")?.first("b").attributedString // will return Test selector.filter("a").attributedString // will return Test Link // render from selector result let selector = parser.selector(htmlString) // HTMLSelector e.g. input: TestLink parser.render(selector.first("a")?.first("b")) ```
translations.```swift\nparser.render(String) { _ in }:
```swift
parser.render(String) { _ in }...
parser.stripper(String) { _ in }...
parser.selector(String) { _ in }...
```

translations.`initWithDefault` 會自動加入預先定義的 HTML Tag Na: `initWithDefault` automatically adds predefined HTML Tag Names, default corresponding MarkupStyles, and predefined Style Attributes.
translations.`set(rootStyle:)` 可指定整個字串的預設樣式，也可不指定。\n\: `set(rootStyle:)` can specify the default style for the entire string, or it can be left unspecified.
translations.使用純 Swift 開發，透過 Regex 剖析出 HTML Tag 並經過 T: Developed purely in Swift, it parses HTML tags using Regex and performs tokenization, analyzes and corrects tag accuracy (fixing tags without ends & misaligned tags), then converts them into an abstract syntax tree. Finally, it uses the Visitor Pattern to map HTML tags to abstract styles, producing the final NSAttributedString result; it does not rely on any parser libraries.
translations.包含架構設計，方便對 HTML Tag 進行擴充\n目前純了支援基本的樣式之外還:
Includes architecture design for easy HTML tag extension  
Currently, besides supporting basic styles, it also supports rendering ul/ol/li lists and hr separators. Future extensions for other HTML tags can be quickly supported.
translations.另外如果要渲染長字串，可改用 async 方法，防止卡 UI。\n\n: For rendering long strings, you can use the async method to prevent UI blocking.
translations.可依照自己想套用到 HTML Tag 上對應的樣式自行宣告：\n\n: You can declare your own styles to apply to the corresponding HTML tags as you wish:
translations.可直接下載專案打開 `ZMarkupParser.xcworkspace` 選擇: You can directly download the project, open `ZMarkupParser.xcworkspace`, select the `ZMarkupParser-Demo` target, then build & run to test the functionality.
translations.如同前述，HTML 支援從 Style Attribute 指定樣式，這邊也抽象: As mentioned earlier, HTML supports specifying styles via the Style Attribute. Here, we also abstract it to allow specifying supported styles and extensions. The currently predefined HTML Style Attributes are as follows:
translations.如果要渲染複雜的 HTML，還是需要使用 WKWebView (包含 JS/表格: For rendering complex HTML, you still need to use WKWebView (including JS/tables rendering).
translations.宣告要渲染的 HTML Tag 與對應的 Markup Style，目前預定義的: Declare the HTML tags to be rendered and their corresponding Markup Styles. The currently predefined HTML tag names are as follows:
